found_supplies.title: Abandoned Cache
found_supplies.description: Your scouts discover an abandoned supply cache hidden in the ruins of an old watchtower.

outcomes.outcome_description: You take all the supplies, ensuring your group has enough food and resources.
You take only the essentials, leaving some behind for other travelers.

refugees_join.title: Refugees Seek Shelter
refugees_join.description: A small group of refugees fleeing the forest asks to join your exodus.

outcomes.outcome_description: You welcome the refugees, providing them with food and shelter. They join your group.
You reluctantly turn the refugees away. They disappear into the wilderness.

good_hunting.title: Abundant Game
good_hunting.description: Your hunters spot a herd of deer grazing in a nearby meadow.

outcomes.outcome_description: Your skilled hunters bring back a large haul of food.
You decide to let the deer pass, hoping for another opportunity later.

friendly_traders.title: Traveling Merchants
friendly_traders.description: A caravan of merchants offers to trade with you at fair prices.

outcomes.outcome_description: You purchase provisions from the merchants at a fair price.
You stock up on healing supplies from the merchants.
You decline the offer, choosing to rely on your current supplies.

medicinal_grove.title: Medicinal Grove
medicinal_grove.description: Your foragers discover a clearing rich with healing herbs and rare plants.

outcomes.outcome_description: Your foragers carefully harvest the plants, yielding a generous supply of medicine.
You grab what you can quickly, taking some medicine and edible plants.

ancient_treasury.title: Elven Treasury
ancient_treasury.description: Beneath the roots of a great fallen tree your scouts discover a sealed elven vault, untouched for centuries.

outcomes.outcome_description: The vault yields ancient gold and preserved medicine. The detour was well worth it.
You press on, leaving the vault undisturbed. Perhaps someone else will find it.

generous_wanderer.title: Wandering Healer
generous_wanderer.description: A lone elven healer emerges from the treeline. She has been traveling alone for months and offers what she can to your group.

outcomes.outcome_description: She tends to the injured and leaves you with herbal remedies. A few lost stragglers she found along the way rejoin the group.

outcomes.text: Ask her to join the exodus
outcomes.outcome_description: She agrees to join and spreads word to other wanderers. A small group rallies to your exodus.

bandit_ambush.title: Bandit Ambush!
bandit_ambush.description: Bandits emerge from the treeline, demanding your supplies!

outcomes.outcome_description: Your warriors charge into the bandits. Blood is shed on both sides.
You pay the bandits to leave. They take the gold and disappear into the trees.
Your diplomat talks them down. They accept a smaller payment and stand aside.

disease_outbreak.title: Disease Outbreak
disease_outbreak.description: A fever spreads through the camp. Many are falling ill.

outcomes.outcome_description: You treat the sick with medicine. Most recover, but some are lost.
You isolate the sick and pray. The disease runs its course, taking many with it.

harsh_storm.title: Violent Storm
harsh_storm.description: Dark clouds gather and a fierce storm batters your caravan.

outcomes.outcome_description: You push through the storm, suffering losses but maintaining your course.
You make camp and wait out the storm. You lose a day but your followers are safe.

deserters.title: Deserters
deserters.description: Some followers have lost faith and are planning to leave in the night.

outcomes.outcome_description: You allow the deserters to leave. Their absence weakens the group.
You spend gold to motivate your followers. Most stay, but a few still slip away.

sickness_spreads.title: Sickness Spreads
sickness_spreads.description: A mysterious fever moves through the weakest members of your group.

outcomes.outcome_description: Your healers tend to the sick. The fever passes quickly with treatment.

outcomes.text: Push on and hope it passes
outcomes.outcome_description: You press forward. The fever lingers, claiming several lives before it fades.

wolf_pack_attack.title: Wolf Pack!
wolf_pack_attack.description: A pack of massive wolves descends on your camp in the night. Guards scramble to hold them back.

outcomes.outcome_description: Your warriors drive off the wolves with steel and torches. The pack retreats into the darkness.

outcomes.text: Drive them away with fire (costs 15 food)
outcomes.outcome_description: You burn torches and food scraps to drive the wolves back. A few followers are bitten before the pack retreats.

collapsed_bridge.title: Collapsed Bridge
collapsed_bridge.description: The only bridge over a raging river has completely collapsed. Crossing is impossible without a plan.

outcomes.text: Hire locals to repair it (costs 40 gold)
outcomes.outcome_description: Local workers rebuild the crossing in a day. It costs dearly but you cross without further delay.
Scouts find a shallow crossing upstream but the long detour costs two full days and drains rations.
You wade through the torrent. Several followers are swept away or badly injured in the crossing.

tainted_water.title: Poisoned Water Source
tainted_water.description: Your water bearers return pale-faced — the river ahead is tainted with dark rot. Sickness is already spreading through camp.

outcomes.outcome_description: Your healers move fast. Most of the afflicted survive with treatment, but a few succumb before it takes hold.
You press forward on minimal water. The sickness claims several lives before you reach clean water downstream.

outcomes.text: Search for a clean source (lose 1 day)
outcomes.outcome_description: Scouts search for a clean source. The detour costs a day and some fall ill in the delay, but losses are lower.

mysterious_shrine.title: Ancient Shrine
mysterious_shrine.description: You discover an ancient elven shrine, still radiating faint magic.

outcomes.outcome_description: The shrine answers your prayer. Your followers feel renewed and supplies appear.
You take offerings from the shrine, gaining gold but unsettling some followers.
You pass the shrine in respectful silence and continue on your way.

abandoned_outpost.title: Abandoned Elven Outpost
abandoned_outpost.description: The crumbling ruins of an old elven outpost emerge through the trees.

outcomes.outcome_description: You spend a day picking through the ruins. You find scattered gold and old medicine.
Sheltered walls give your followers proper rest. Some of the wounded recover.

outcomes.text: Take what you can and move on
outcomes.outcome_description: You grab a few valuables from the ruins and press on without stopping.

traveling_bard.title: Wandering Bard
traveling_bard.description: A cheerful bard crosses your path and offers to travel with you for a stretch, lifting the spirits of your weary followers.

outcomes.outcome_description: The bard's music and tales breathe new life into the exodus. Spirits soar and a few wanderers who hear the songs join your group.
The bard joins in exchange for food and shelter. Their songs raise morale and a couple of nearby wanderers follow along.

abandoned_caravan.title: Abandoned Caravan
abandoned_caravan.description: The charred remains of a merchant caravan lie scattered across the road. Whatever happened here was recent.

outcomes.outcome_description: You spend a day combing through the wreckage. Gold, medicine, and preserved food are salvaged from the debris.

outcomes.text: Grab what's visible and move on
outcomes.outcome_description: You quickly snatch visible valuables and loose rations before pressing on. Not much, but every bit counts.

outcomes.text: Leave it — could be a trap
outcomes.outcome_description: You press on, wary of ambushes. Better to be safe than greedy.
